title: Democrat backed by Ripple co-founder’s PAC wins Colorado primary
summary: Democrat backed by Ripple co-founder’s PAC wins Colorado primary
briefing: Colorado’s Democratic and Republican primaries finished on Tuesday, with at least one candidate supported by $1 million from a crypto-aligned PAC going to the November general election.

title: Bitcoin bear market ‘dead’ after first TD9 reversal signal since July 2022 fires
summary: Bitcoin bear market ‘dead’ after first TD9 reversal signal since July 2022 fires
briefing: Bitcoin bear-market bottom signs appear as the TD9 indicator mirrors the final stages of the 2022 BTC price downtrend.

title: Crypto ATM bans, restrictions now in effect in Tennessee and Georgia
summary: Crypto ATM bans, restrictions now in effect in Tennessee and Georgia
briefing: Crypto ATM's are fast disappearing in the US as Tennessee’s ban goes into effect today while operators in Minnesota have until Aug. 1 to comply with a similar law.

title: Anchorage Digital brings off-exchange settlement to Binance
summary: Anchorage Digital brings off-exchange settlement to Binance
briefing: The integration addresses one of the biggest obstacles keeping institutional capital on the sidelines of crypto markets: exchange counterparty risk.

title: Bitcoin price returns to $60K as US dollar strength rejects weekly high
summary: Bitcoin price returns to $60K as US dollar strength rejects weekly high
briefing: Bitcoin started July with a bang, rallying above $60,000 as traders predict a relief rally as the “base case” throughout the month.

title: Ethereum backers launch nonprofit to lead institutional adoption efforts
summary: Ethereum backers launch nonprofit to lead institutional adoption efforts
briefing: Backed by Joe Lubin, BitMine and SharpLink, the independent organization will serve as a liaison for financial institutions exploring Ethereum as competition for institutional capital heats up.

title: French banking giant Crédit Agricole launches EURXT euro stablecoin
summary: French banking giant Crédit Agricole launches EURXT euro stablecoin
briefing: Crédit Agricole’s CACEIS launches a euro-pegged stablecoin on Ethereum with 20.02 million tokens issued, targeting institutional flows and tokenized fund access.

title: Bank of Korea governor outlines tokenized bond vision, unified ledger plan
summary: Bank of Korea governor outlines tokenized bond vision, unified ledger plan
briefing: The Bank of Korea’s governor praised tokenized government bonds for easing the issuance and management of government debt during a panel discussion at the ECB Forum.

title: UN's First AI Safety Panel Says Scientists Can't Rule Out 'Catastrophic Harm'
summary: UN's First AI Safety Panel Says Scientists Can't Rule Out 'Catastrophic Harm'
briefing: A 40-scientist panel found that AI capabilities are outrunning both scientific understanding and government oversight.

title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin Hits New Low Price Ahead of Reverse Stock Split
summary: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin Hits New Low Price Ahead of Reverse Stock Split
briefing: Bitcoin mining firm American Bitcoin fell to a new low price Wednesday, one day before executing a 1-for-15 reverse stock split.

title: BitMine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin Accelerate Wall Street Ethereum Push With Nonprofit Launch
summary: BitMine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin Accelerate Wall Street Ethereum Push With Nonprofit Launch
briefing: Ethereum Institutional will serve as a point of contact for financial institutions seeking to get more involved with on-chain infrastructure.

title: CRCL Sell-Off 'Looks Overdone' Say Analysts as Circle CEO Addresses Open USD Threat
summary: CRCL Sell-Off 'Looks Overdone' Say Analysts as Circle CEO Addresses Open USD Threat
briefing: Analysts don't think the threat of a new stablecoin launch was enough to warrant a major Circle (CRCL) sell-off on Tuesday.

title: Bitcoin Pops Off 21-Month Low to $60K as Soft Data Eases Rate-Hike Fears
summary: Bitcoin Pops Off 21-Month Low to $60K as Soft Data Eases Rate-Hike Fears
briefing: BTC recovered from local lows to $60,000 after softer U.S. jobs and factory data revived hopes the Fed's hawkish turn could be easing.

title: Ahead of NYSE Listing, Securitize Exec Says DeFi Can Break Wall Street's Grip on Stock Lending
summary: Ahead of NYSE Listing, Securitize Exec Says DeFi Can Break Wall Street's Grip on Stock Lending
briefing: Securitize President Brett Redfearn argues that tokenization will bring crypto's core benefit of disintermediation to retail investors.

title: Anthropic Bringing Claude Fable 5 Back Online as US Lifts Export Controls
summary: Anthropic Bringing Claude Fable 5 Back Online as US Lifts Export Controls
briefing: The Trump administration reversed its shutdown order after weeks of talks, with Anthropic tying Fable 5's return to a new safety classifier and other moves.

title: Forward Industries Shares Spike as Leading Solana Treasury Adds $38 Million in SOL
summary: Forward Industries Shares Spike as Leading Solana Treasury Adds $38 Million in SOL
briefing: Shares in top Solana treasury firm Forward Industries are jumping Wedesday after announcing that it added over 500,000 SOL to its stash.
